movies.name: Tom and Jerry
movies.description: A classic animated comedy about the endless rivalry between Tom the cat and Jerry the mouse.

movies.name: Family Guy
movies.description: An animated sitcom that follows the dysfunctional Griffin family and their absurd adventures.

movies.name: Puss in Boots
movies.description: A swashbuckling animated adventure following the legendary sword-fighting cat from the Shrek universe.

movies.name: The Adventures of Tintin
movies.description: An animated action adventure about the young reporter Tintin traveling the world solving mysteries.

movies.name: The Lion King
movies.description: Disney's animated classic about Simba, a lion prince who must reclaim his rightful place as king.

movies.name: Samson
movies.description: An animated story inspired by the biblical hero Samson and his journey of strength and redemption.
